title: Falcon - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Charge Stand pairing info persists in Device Settings > Software Update after removing headset from stand, restarting device, and restarting app
steps: Precondition: Headset is paired with the Poly Studio Mobile app but NOT paired with the Charge Stand (no Charge Stand info in Device Settings > Software Update).
Place the turned-on headset on the Charge Stand → Charging icon appears on the headset.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Go to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update tab.
Verify that Charge Stand info is present.
Remove the headset from the Charge Stand.
Go to Device Settings → Software Update tab and verify Charge Stand info remains.
Go to Device Settings → Software Update tab and verify Charge Stand info remains.
Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app (force close and reopen).
Go to Device Settings → Software Update tab and verify Charge Stand info remains.
expected: Charge Stand info appears in Device Settings > Software Update after placing the headset on the Charge Stand, and persists after removing the headset, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
